tldr: Replace Branch's deep linking and MMP with Airbridge's published-price subscription and similar feature surface.
why_switch: Branch pricing is opaque; Airbridge publishes from $199/month
Includes 15K attributed installs free for early-stage testing
Airbridge has lower scored lock-in for attribution data
Comparable deep linking, web-to-app, and SKAN coverage
Consolidate links + attribution in one tool with clearer cost
what_to_export: Branch link inventory (long links, short links, link metadata)
Custom data and analytics tags attached to links
Install, click, and re-engagement event logs
Universal Link / App Link domain configurations
export_method: Use Branch's data export and exports API to retrieve link metadata, click/install events, and attribution logs to your warehouse or S3. Confirm the current export options, retention windows, and quotas in Branch's official documentation before relying on a specific endpoint.
import_method: Integrate the Airbridge SDK in a new app build, configure your associated domain / app link entitlements for Airbridge link routing, and re-create campaigns, partners, and SKAN conversion values in the Airbridge console. For existing Branch links already in the wild, plan a redirect strategy via your owned domain or maintain Branch links during a transition window. Verify supported features against current Airbridge docs.

concept_mapping.note: Not 1:1; existing Branch URLs need redirects or sunset plan
Re-implement routing logic on cold start
Re-map event names, revenue, and custom params
Reconfigure each ad network from Airbridge side
Feature parity not guaranteed; check current docs

gotchas: Live Branch links in emails, ads, and partner placements need a redirect strategy
Universal Link / App Link config requires app store updates
Run both SDKs in parallel to reconcile attribution before cutover
Web-to-app journey features may not have direct equivalents
SKAN conversion value mapping must be re-validated end-to-end
Plan for a long tail of users on old app versions still pinging Branch

email.subject: Migrating deep linking + MMP from Branch to Airbridge
email.body:
Hi team,

We're planning to migrate from Branch to Airbridge to get clearer pricing and consolidate links + attribution.

Plan:
1. Export Branch link metadata, clicks, installs, and attribution logs to our warehouse.
2. Integrate the Airbridge SDK and update associated domains / App Links in the next release.
3. Define a redirect strategy for live Branch links in ads, emails, and partner placements.
4. Run both SDKs in parallel and reconcile before fully cutting over.

Expected effort: 2-4 weeks. Existing Branch links will need ongoing handling until users update.

Questions welcome.
